issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflows, causing HAs and TCs to receive double tasks. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Hubspot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or ignore the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to an earlier stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion. Madelaine updated the workflow to include it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not trigger TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents still referenced the previous LO instead of the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed Paul. Luis resolved the issue on the product side.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was recently changed, manually send the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs received no tasks for closing coordination. The issue affected at least one deal marked OA on 3/14. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed a fix was applied.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
